'''gachïfpïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiar|fiar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiar|fiar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| gachïfpïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gæchïfpïfth || gæchïfpïfj || gæchïfpïfsh || gæchïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gachïfchïfpïfth || gachïfchïfpïfj || gachïfchïfpïfsh || gachïfchïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gachïfpïfth || gachïfpïfj || gachïfpïfsh || gachïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gachïffpïffth || gachïffpïffj || gachïffpïffsh || gachïffpïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || gachïfpïfïf || gachïfpïfïf || gachïfpïfïf || gachïfpïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || gachïfpïfth || gachïfpïfj || gachïfpïfsh || gachïfpïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || gachïfpïfïfl || gachïfpïfïfl || gachïfpïfïfl || gachïfpïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || gachïfpïfïfïf || gachïfpïfïfïf || gachïfpïfïfïf || gachïfpïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || gachïfpïfïfn || gachïfpïfïfn || gachïfpïfïfn || gachïfpïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || gachïfpïfïforo || gachïfpïfïforo || gachïfpïfïforo || gachïfpïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
